title: tenageia bufonia
intro: Tenageia bufonia, also known as Indian Barberry, is a type of plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial qualities. The health benefits of Tenageia bufonia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various respiratory issues. Tenageia bufonia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
